input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.3.2.1
            TITLE: the steering wheel must be mechanically connected to the front wheels

            CONTENT:
            rule V.3.2.1: The Steering Wheel must be mechanically connected to the front wheels
V.3.2.1 The Steering Wheel must be mechanically connected to the front wheels
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 21 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The Steering Wheel must be mechanically connected to the front wheels
